Meaning.Vi: được may thêm lớp lót (vải, vải lót) bên trong)
Meaning.En: having a layer of fabric or material sewn inside, especially for warmth, structure, or lining the inside of a garment or container.
Meaning.Example: The winter coat was well-lined with soft fleece.

Situation.Vi: Mô tả trang phục hoặc vật dụng có lớp lót bên trong.
Situation.En: Describing clothing or items (e.g., coats, hats, bags) that have an inner fabric layer.

Situation.Vi: Chỉ định chất liệu của lớp lót (ví dụ: lụa, vải nỉ).
Situation.En: Specifying the lining material (e.g., silk, flannel).

Meaning.Vi: được kẻ đường kẻ (đường thẳng, vạch chỉ dẫn)
Meaning.En: marked with lines, especially straight or parallel lines; often used to describe surfaces, paper, or diagrams.
Meaning.Example: The notebook page was lined with faint blue guide lines.

Situation.Vi: Mô tả giấy kẻ ngang, kẻ ô, hoặc bề mặt có đường kẻ.
Situation.En: Describing ruled or grid paper, or any surface with drawn lines (e.g., for writing, drawing, or measurement).
